candidate_evidence.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday regression channel residual rank over multi-horizon OLS slope, residual z-score, channel width, residual persistence, slope acceleration, channel efficiency, day residual pressure, session progress, and spread-channel stress
candidate_evidence.next_boundary: candidate robustness audit found target-range activity, positive proxy, passed schedule replay parity, positive MT5 tick total net PnL, and eight profitable folds, but one fold is slightly losing, every fold is tick-worse than closed-bar logic, the proxy edge is short-dominant, and cost/slippage/native materialization/ONNX evidence remains incomplete; next work should design a true C0045 R0002 directional cost-buffer hardening run rather than selected, economics-pass, runtime, ONNX, promotion, or live claim
candidate_evidence.reason_candidate_evidence: target-range activity, positive proxy, passed schedule replay parity, positive MT5 tick total net PnL, and eight of nine rolling-window tick folds profitable with only a slight worst-fold loss

supporting_lessons.summary: intraday regression channel residual rank produced 7.87931 entries per active day, positive total fold-isolated tick net PnL, eight profitable folds, one losing fold, and worst fold net PnL -1.09
tick execution worsened total net PnL by -61.37 versus closed-bar logic, with 0 tick-better folds, 9 tick-worse folds, and minimum exit-reason match rate 0.715105
candidate quality remains unselected because one fold is losing, long-side proxy performance is weak, stress testing, native materialization, and ONNX portability evidence are not complete

R0001 candidate evidence is useful but requires hardening: aggregate extra cost buffer is 0.033561 account currency units per entry, weakest positive fold rw_002 has 0.014253 per entry to zero, and 8/9 folds remain profitable after a 0.01 adverse cost diagnostic
